creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 249143
Update to 1.0.2

Update dovecot-fts-flatcurve to the current stable release.
Per upstream, this provides a "Fix assert-crash in certain instances when doing multi-mailbox searches (e.g., virtual mailbox search)."

Full changelog can be found here:

https://github.com/slusarz/dovecot-fts-flatcurve/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.2
